evals.prompt: 从 master 拉一个图片预加载 topvv 优化 worktree
evals.expected_output: Infers branch feat/image-preload-topvv and dir image-preload-topvv, preflight-checks ../image-preload-topvv, shows the plan, then executes gw-add with master as base.
assertions: Uses an explicit master base without asking a follow-up question.
Uses branch format <type>/<slug> and a short directory slug without the prefix.
Checks target directory existence before running gw-add.
Executes gw-add through zsh so the local function is available.

evals.prompt: 帮我拉一个搜索过滤修复的 worktree
evals.expected_output: Does not execute because base is missing; asks which base branch to use.
assertions: Does not run gw-add or git worktree commands.
Asks for the base branch before proceeding.
May infer a likely fix/* branch and short dir only as a proposed plan, not as an executed command.

evals.prompt: 从开发分支 dev/search-router 拉一个 packer 路由重构 worktree，目录叫 packer-router
evals.expected_output: Uses base dev/search-router, branch refactor/packer-router, dir packer-router, and stops if ../packer-router already exists.
assertions: Uses the explicitly named development branch as base.
Uses refactor/ prefix for a refactor request.
Stops and asks for a new directory name if the target directory already exists.

evals.expected_output: Treats 004-init-engine-framework as an existing branch if local or origin branch exists, does not invent feat/004-init-engine-framework, and runs gw-add with -d so no base is required.
assertions: Checks refs/heads/004-init-engine-framework and refs/remotes/origin/004-init-engine-framework before asking for a base branch.
Uses branch=004-init-engine-framework exactly when the branch exists.
Uses command form gw-add 004-init-engine-framework -d 004-init-engine-framework for existing branch checkout.
Does not create feat/004-init-engine-framework for this prompt.

evals.prompt: 我在 search_loader 这种 bare-root 目录下，给已有远端分支 004-init-engine-framework 拉 worktree
evals.expected_output: Detects the current directory is a bare-root repo, sets target to ./004-init-engine-framework under the repo root, and reports if that branch is already checked out elsewhere.
assertions: Detects .git containing gitdir: ./.bare and plans target ./004-init-engine-framework.
Runs git worktree list --porcelain to check whether the branch is already checked out.
Stops instead of creating a duplicate worktree if the branch is already present in worktree list.
